code.description: Machine-readable error code. Stable across versions; safe to switch on.

details.description: Optional structured context — field paths, retry-after seconds, etc.

code.description: Stable machine code. Per-row: `INVALID_NAME`. Whole-request (every row carries it): `WORKSPACE_NOT_MEMBER`, `READ_ONLY`, `TIER_FEATURE_REQUIRED`, `COLLECTION_LIMIT_REACHED`, `BULK_TOO_LARGE`.

name.description: The row's requested name, echoed for failed rows.

shortUrl.description: Canonical, copy-paste-ready short link. Use this directly rather than reassembling it from host + `path`.

code.description: Stable machine code. For bulk create: `INVALID_URL`, `URL_TOO_LONG`, `PATH_TAKEN`, `PATH_TOO_SHORT`, `PATH_TOO_DEEP`, `PATH_INVALID_FORMAT`, `DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND`, `DOMAIN_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`, `DOMAIN_REQUIRES_UPGRADE` (per-row); `WORKSPACE_NOT_MEMBER`, `READ_ONLY`, `COLLECTION_NOT_FOUND`, `COLLECTION_NOT_MANUAL`, `BULK_TOO_LARGE` (whole-request — every row carries the same error).

targetUrl.description: The row's target URL, echoed so the caller can name the failed row.

code.description: Stable machine code. For bulk create: `INVALID_URL`, `URL_TOO_LONG`, `PATH_TAKEN`, `PATH_TOO_SHORT`, `PATH_TOO_DEEP`, `PATH_INVALID_FORMAT`, `DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND`, `DOMAIN_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`, `DOMAIN_REQUIRES_UPGRADE` (per-row); `WORKSPACE_NOT_MEMBER`, `READ_ONLY`, `COLLECTION_NOT_FOUND`, `COLLECTION_NOT_MANUAL`, `BULK_TOO_LARGE` (whole-request — every row carries the same error).

shortUrl.description: Canonical, copy-paste-ready short link. Use this directly rather than reassembling it from host + `path`.

code.description: Stable machine code. For bulk create: `INVALID_URL`, `URL_TOO_LONG`, `PATH_TAKEN`, `PATH_TOO_SHORT`, `PATH_TOO_DEEP`, `PATH_INVALID_FORMAT`, `DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND`, `DOMAIN_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`, `DOMAIN_REQUIRES_UPGRADE` (per-row); `WORKSPACE_NOT_MEMBER`, `READ_ONLY`, `COLLECTION_NOT_FOUND`, `COLLECTION_NOT_MANUAL`, `BULK_TOO_LARGE` (whole-request — every row carries the same error).

rules.description: Array of Condition objects when type='smart'; null when 'manual'.

materialized.description: Number of links inserted into the junction at conversion time.

source.description: `custom` when the caller supplied `path`; `auto` when the path was allocated.

targetReachable.description: Advisory reachability of `targetUrl`: `true` if it resolved to a live page, `false` if unreachable, `null` when not checked. Only probed when the request passes `?verify=true`. Never blocks creation — a link is always returned. (401/403 count as reachable.)

hostname.description: The domain hostname (e.g. "zlnk.to") — pass this as `domain` on link-create. Clients never need the `id`.

tier.description: Access tier for platform domains; `null` for custom domains.

shortUrl.description: Canonical, copy-paste-ready short link. Use this directly rather than reassembling it from host + `path`.

fallback.description: Where a visitor goes when the link is off. `null` inherits the domain default, then the system default (a branded inactive page). `target_root` redirects to the destination's root domain; `url` redirects to an explicit URL.

shortUrl.description: Canonical, copy-paste-ready short link (e.g. "https://zlnk.to/abc"). Use this directly — do NOT reassemble it from `hostname` + `path`, which carries a leading slash and double-slashes if joined naively.

fallback.description: Where a visitor goes when the link is off. `null` inherits the domain default, then the system default (a branded inactive page). `target_root` redirects to the destination's root domain; `url` redirects to an explicit URL.

shortUrl.description: Canonical, copy-paste-ready short link (e.g. "https://zlnk.to/abc"). Use this directly — do NOT reassemble it from `hostname` + `path`, which carries a leading slash and double-slashes if joined naively.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. `null` when there are no more pages.

accessibleSpaces.description: Spaces this API key can act on. An all-scope key returns every space the user is a member of; a selected-scope key returns only the allowlisted spaces.

prefix.description: First ~8 characters of the key, safe to log.

shortUrl.description: Canonical, copy-paste-ready short link. Use this directly rather than reassembling it from host + `path`.

pathChanged.description: `true` when the patch contained a `path` that differed from the current value.

apiKey.description: Space-scoped API key. Provision via the dashboard; pass as `Authorization: Bearer zeb_…`.

info.description: Public REST API for Zebra Link. Space-scoped via API key. Every endpoint here is a thin call into a shared core function that the dashboard also uses — the two surfaces have identical semantics.
info.title: Zebra Link API

get.description: Returns a static `{ ok: true, api: 'v1' }`. Public — no auth. Use for uptime monitoring and to verify the API surface is reachable.
Returns the user the API key acts as, the spaces the key is authorized for, and the key's own metadata. Useful for client-side key introspection: "who am I, what can I do?"

Returns ALL collections in the space (no pagination — capped at 100 by plan limits) along with each one's current `linkCount`. Smart collections have their count computed live from rules. Order via `sort` (default `creation-date-desc`; same vocabulary as the link lists) — click-based sorts rank collections by their current members' click analytics.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

post.description: Creates a manual or smart collection. Manual collections start empty and have links added via `POST /collections/{id}/links`. Smart collections compute membership at read time from a `rules` array (Condition objects).

402.description: Space is read-only, collection limit reached, or tier doesn't include the collections feature.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

post.description: Batch-creates up to 50 **manual** collections in a single transaction — ideal for an agent spinning up a set of folders at once. Smart collections are NOT creatable here (they need `rules`; use the single `POST /collections`). Names are not unique per space (duplicates are allowed). The plan-tier collection cap is enforced as all-or-nothing: if the batch would push the space over its limit, none are created (`COLLECTION_LIMIT_REACHED`).

200.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; 207 (Multi-Status) when partially successful. Inspect each row's `success`.

207.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; 207 (Multi-Status) when partially successful. Inspect each row's `success`.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

post.summary: Create many collections in one request

delete.description: Hard-deletes the collection and cascades junction rows. Links themselves are not deleted.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

404.description: Collection not found (or in a different space).

get.description: Returns one collection including its live `linkCount`. A collectionId in a different space returns 404.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

404.description: Collection not found (or in a different space).

patch.description: Patches `name`, `description`, or `rules`. Setting `rules` on a manual collection is rejected. Setting `rules` on a smart collection replaces the rule set.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

404.description: Collection not found (or in a different space).

422.description: Validation failed or attempted to set rules on a manual collection.

post.description: Materializes the smart collection's current rule-matches into the junction and flips `type='manual', rules=NULL` in one transaction. Rejects already-manual collections. The resulting manual collection no longer rotates as link state changes — it's a snapshot.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

post.summary: Convert a smart collection to manual

delete.description: Removes the listed link memberships from the collection (manual only). Idempotent — links that aren't members are no-ops.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

422.description: Validation failed or smart collection rejection.

delete.summary: Remove links from a manual collection

get.description: Returns links that are members of the collection. For manual collections, walks the junction; for smart collections, evaluates the rules against the space's links at request time. Order via `sort` (default `creation-date-desc`; same vocabulary as the space link list). Keyset pagination via `?cursor=&limit=` — a cursor is only valid under the sort that issued it.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

post.description: Adds the listed links to the collection (manual only). Idempotent — re-adding a link that's already a member counts as `alreadyMember`, not an error. Smart collections reject this — change the rules instead.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

422.description: Validation failed, smart collection rejection, or link outside the space.

post.summary: Add links to a manual collection

get.description: Returns the short domains this space can create links on (usable and enabled). Pass a returned `hostname` as the `domain` field on link-create — or omit `domain` entirely to use the space's default (first free platform) domain.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

get.description: Returns the space's links with the domain hostname joined inline. Order via `sort` (default `creation-date-desc`); click-based sorts order by the space's click analytics. Keyset pagination via the opaque `cursor` query param — pass back the `nextCursor` from the prior response to advance (a cursor is only valid under the sort that issued it). Defaults to 50 per page, capped at 100.

parameters.description: Filter to a single short domain (dom_* id).
parameters.name: shortDomain

schema.description: Filter to a single short domain (dom_* id).

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a prior response. Only valid with the same `sort` it was issued under.
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a prior response. Only valid with the same `sort` it was issued under.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

post.description: Creates a short link in the named space. `domain` is an optional hostname or dom_* id (e.g. "zlnk.to", from `GET …/domains`) — omit it to use the space's default domain. `collection` is an optional manual collection name or col_* id; duplicate names require an id. `path` is optional too — when omitted, one is auto-allocated under the namespace (default: root). The same `createLinkCore` runs for the dashboard.

parameters.description: When `true`, probe the target once after creating the link and report `targetReachable` in the response. Adds a network round-trip; off by default. Never blocks creation.
parameters.name: verify

schema.description: When `true`, probe the target once after creating the link and report `targetReachable` in the response. Adds a network round-trip; off by default. Never blocks creation.

402.description: Space is read-only — no active subscription.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

422.description: Validation failed or path/domain/collection/URL rejected by the core.

delete.description: Deletes up to 250 links by id in a single batch (one `DELETE`; collection memberships cascade automatically). Rows fail independently — an id that's missing or belongs to a different space returns `LINK_NOT_FOUND` for that row only; the rest still delete. Deletion is permanent; clicks already recorded are unaffected.

200.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

207.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

delete.summary: Delete many links in one request

patch.description: Patches multiple links. Each `updates[]` row carries a `linkId` and the partial fields to patch (same shape as single-row PATCH). Rows fail independently with per-row error envelopes.

200.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

207.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

patch.summary: Patch many links in one request

post.description:
Creates up to 250 links in a single atomic batch (the short codes are block-reserved from the per-domain counter, then inserted in one statement). Per-row outcomes are returned independently — a malformed URL or taken custom path fails just that row in `results`, never the batch. Set `collection` to a manual collection name or col_* id to add every created link to that collection in the same call; duplicate names require an id.

NOTE: batch creation runs only CHEAP validation — URL *shape* and custom-path availability. Unlike the single-row `POST /links`, it does NOT fetch each destination to scrape a title/preview or check reachability (that round-trip per link isn't viable at batch scale), so `title` is taken from what you send.

200.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

207.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

post.summary: Create many links in one request

delete.description: Hard-deletes the named link and invalidates its cache entry. There is no recovery. A linkId in a different space returns 404.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

404.description: Link not found (or in a different space).

get.description: Returns one link with its domain hostname joined inline. A linkId that exists in a different space returns 404 (existence is not leaked).

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

404.description: Link not found (or in a different space).

patch.description: Patches the named link. Every body field is optional — omitting one leaves the column unchanged. `title: null` clears the title; `title: undefined` (omitting it) doesn't touch it. A linkId that exists in a different space returns 404 (existence is not leaked).

402.description: Space is read-only — no active subscription.

403.description: API key is not authorized for the requested space.

404.description: Link not found (or in a different space).

422.description: Validation failed or path/URL rejected by the core.
